notes_for_human_reviewer: INTERMEDIATE — nails the artefact disciplines but FAILS the human/fairness half, so it does NOT pass (a dim below 3). The async decision message is excellent (context + options + recommendation + by-when + reply ask) — async_with_context 5 — and it writes and circulates the IdP/MFA decision well — written_memory 5, meeting_judgment 4. But it completely ignores the two-month 2am burden on Toronto (timezone_fairness 1) and never addresses Arjun (human_layer 1). This is the deliberate 'great at the mechanics, blind to the people' profile: strong overall average pulled below pass by the two floored dims. Tests whether the grader holds the per-dim pass bar rather than rewarding a high average — distributed coordination is the human layer too, not just clean async.
